title: Daring Youth
writer: Dorothy Farnum, Alexander Neal, William Shakespeare
actors: Bebe Daniels, Norman Kerry, Lee Moran
plot: Alita Allen is about to be married to her fiancé, John Campbell. However, Alita's mother--who has been unhappily married for 25 years--puts her foot down and tells her husband that there's a new arrangement: she will have breakfas...
